scenarios.name: db_outage_during_freeze
scenarios.detail: DB outage during freeze: FAIL_CLOSED policy defined; freezeStrong() present; memory fallback documented

scenarios.name: concurrent_promotion_safety
scenarios.detail: Concurrent promotions: DB freeze read authoritative; advisory lock in ledger

scenarios.name: operator_token_replay_protection
scenarios.detail: Token replay: JTI present; revocation wired; timingSafeEqual used

scenarios.name: stale_authority_epoch_detection
scenarios.detail: Authority epoch: async DB increment present; in-memory cache may lag on DB failure
caveats: Screen freeze epoch reporting not implemented — stale screen detection is one-sided

scenarios.name: manifest_generation_race
scenarios.detail: Manifest generation: async DB-authoritative; manifestEngine.js awaits

scenarios.name: lineage_orphan_handling
scenarios.detail: Lineage orphan: ORPHANED_EVENT detected; STRICT mode throws; REPLAY mode filters orphans

scenarios.name: replay_determinism
scenarios.detail: Replay determinism: incident IDs deterministic; governed clock present; lineage timestamps remain wall-clock
caveats: lineage_ts in withLineage() still uses wall-clock (intentional: audit timestamp)
Ledger action IDs are sequential (deterministic from DB seq, not content-addressed)

scenarios.name: split_brain_freeze_propagation
scenarios.detail: Split-brain freeze: SPLIT_BRAIN detection triggers _setFreeze; freeze_epoch tracked; getFreezeStateStrong available

scenarios.name: clock_skew_simulation
scenarios.detail: Clock skew simulation: setOffset() present; setFixed() for deterministic replay; freeze/unfreeze for replay mode
caveats: Clock skew simulation only affects governance modules that import governed-clock — screen clocks simulated separately

scenarios.name: recovery_governor_escalation
scenarios.detail: Recovery governor: all 7 categories verified; escalation path present
